offer: For Amazon sellers processing 20–50 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts. We provide an inventory forecasting system instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try sales trend analysis on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the system
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing inventory data
